subject: urban takeover readiness update for North Europe | Frida Kahlo | Q3 review | INIT-1613
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in North Europe. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Winston Churchill as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-1613. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: ops, coffee.
